title: crumbly floral polish baby new potatoes bake
description: an adventurous polish dish featuring baby new potatoes, nuka-pickle, and a hint of floral notes, all in a plant-based-friendly recipe that's perfect for snack time.

ingredients.name: maple syrup
ingredients.notes: grade b or darker for more depth of flavor

instructions: place 4-6 agave leaves on a flat surface.

in a large bowl, combine baby new potatoes, nuka-pickle, sunflower seed butter, hazelnut meal, maple syrup, lemon juice, floral honey, dried marjoram, kosher salt, and black pepper. Mix until well combined.
chop agave leaves in half lengthwise and place 2-3 halves in each agave leaf cup, depending on size.
add a spoonful of the potato mixture to each agave leaf cup.
pour in unsweetened almond milk, leaving about 1/4 inch headspace at the top of each leaf.
place the leaf cups on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
